headline: Dow Jones Futures: Stocks Whipsaw Into Trump's Iran War Deadline; Apple, Tesla Slump
summary: The stock market closed narrowly mixed after whipsaw action ahead of Trump's Iran War deadline at 8 p.m. ET.

headline: Equinix Downgraded by Scotiabank: Is the Data Center Boom Already Priced In?
summary: Equinix (NASDAQ:EQIX) stock has been on a tear, climbing 30% year-to-date to reach $996. So it’s worth asking: has the market already priced in the data center boom? That’s essentially the question Scotiabank is raising with its latest analyst call. Scotiabank downgraded Equinix to Sector Perform from Sector Outperform on April 7, while simultaneously raising ... Equinix Downgraded by Scotiabank: Is the Data Center Boom Already Priced In?

headline: Scotiabank Downgrades Equinix to Sector Perform, Raises Price Target to $1050
summary: Scotiabank  analyst Maher Yaghi   downgrades Equinix (NASDAQ:EQIX) from Sector Outperform to Sector Perform and raises the price target from $997 to $1050.
